reviews.review_description:
Apr 2026 Update - these devs are constantly updating and improving the game based on player input,  as a matter of fact there is an update in the weeks now, with a beta available to try out. The game doesn’t go stale.
 TBH, I have been away from the game for a while, a lot of new games coming out so checking them out…. But then a friend enticed me to run a map- totally forgot how much fun the game is! Seriously I get startled, frustrated and sometimes even angry at those bugs, but I laugh a lot throughout the game. Honestly it has been a minute, but I’m remembering how much fun I have playing Guardians!  No matter what other games I check out, Guardians is my “home”! Come jump in a game with me!

Several months later- I’ve delved into mapmaking and have truly enjoyed making maps for my teams as well as other players!  This game continues to be my #1 -
Come jump in a game with me, or check out one of my maps! 
VeronicaEva 


Guardians Frontline is exhilarating, offers a variety of mission types and constantly adding new maps to play, by far this is my #1 favorite game! I’ve read that others have described it as a mix between HALO, Starship Troopers, Starcraft, Helldivers and its own unique thing, which is TRUE, but it’s more than that.  In this first person shooter, you have to strategize in real time to fight a variety of incredibly aggressive fire-breathing, ice-freezing, ground digging, jumping bugs, electric zappers, and even colossal and almost impossible to kill Queens. Throughout the game, you quickly use tools, and units such as robots, cannons, anti-air, tanks, mechs and more are feverishly dropped onto the field to aid in the cause. This game combines non-stop action and team collaboration (when working with a squad) to defeat waves of ferocious bugs. I am not the only one that has screamed or jumped in real life after an electrifying zapper shock!
The types of missions include, Conquest, Survival, Protect & Defend and Domination. Each can be played single player or multiplayer with up to four players. There is also a variety of PVP games where teams of up to 8, including people or “bots” fight head to head, with or without bugs. 

In addition to the Galaxy Conquest, there are hundreds of community made maps which can be played on various levels, easy, normal, hard, or insane (my personal favorite). To engage the player further, you can actually make and share (if you choose) your own maps!   

The Guardians community is something that should also be mentioned.  The players are amazing, new players are always welcomed and encouraged to ask questions if they don’t understand how to do something! 

The combined experience is unlike any other in VR.  Feel free to jump in a game with me, VeronicaEva

reviews.review_title: Never worked. Always stuck on Loading.
reviews.review_description:
As the title says. Had this game for over a year, bought it on my Quest 3 128gb. Start game, has a scene with armoured soldiers and the word 'Loading' and it just freezes and gets stuck there.

Bought a Quest 3 512gb and installed this on that. Same deal. Loading screen and then it freezes. Tried clearing cache, uninstalling and reinstalling, restarting the headsets. This game has never worked for me.

Failed on two headsets. All my other games work. So it's not my hardware. It's unfortunate, as it does seem like the kind of game I would be really into. Seems like a lottery if it works, so I recommend avoiding it until it's confirmed to work for everyone.

When trying to join a game, it just gets the spinning loading message. I even tried to restart my headset and go back in and get the same message. Then I tried to create a game and it attempts to create a game but then it doesn’t create it it just sits there. Has anyone else having this issue today? Everything was fine up until today April 8, 2026.

developer_response.body:
Hi GlowingOtter58,

Thanks for reaching out and letting us know about this issue. It looks like this was caused by a temporary server problem with one of our network providers, and everything is now back to normal.
 
If you’re still experiencing connection issues, please email us at support@virtualage.com
 or join our Discord, and we’ll be happy to assist you:
https://discord.gg/byDbRMS

Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: This deserves way more fame then it gets you can fight bugs in conquest pvp players drive mechs use a jetpack to get around you should probably search a review and watch gameplay and it has to be atleast 10 minutes because that's the bare minimum amount of time to describe this amazing game its sorta complicated and I don't wanna explain the game but its easy to get the hang of im having a blast 5 stars

This game is incredible! I play it with my dad and brother in a different state and it's such a fun way to stay connected. We've played it multiple times a week for over a year now and we are still not tired of it. Of course there are updates that can delay a game session every now and again, but every game experiences that. Thanks for a great game!
Would love a pvp build your bases and fight to the death. 2vs 2. Also in that pvp, adding buildings that create monsters to send to attack the other team.

This game is an absolute underrated gem. Action TD, crazy tug of war with strong HellDivers 2 and Starship Troopers vibe. Up the 4 in coop, load of custom maps, vehicules and turrets. OK granted, the visuals are not the best, the controls and some stuff feel a bit janky. But if you can get pass those, boy it's one of the best game I own on the Quest. Always active dev, people playing, great community, keep an eye on the sequel "Guardians Planetfall".

Update it did take a little but to start but I got it going and it's fun I enjoy playing the game I plan on playing with my brother now. But if it seems like it freezes give it a minute to load thank you devi for the tip.

developer_response.body:
Hi, 

Sorry to hear that you’re experiencing this issue. The first time the game launches, it may take a little longer to load. In some cases, the music stops during the loading process, which can make it seem like the game is stuck. Please give it up to a minute to finish loading.

If that still doesn't work, would you mind to send us an email at support@virtualage.com or join our discord server here please? https://discord.gg/byDbRMS

Thanks!

reviews.review_description: And try to play the game I’m stuck on the loading screen It’s a scam.￼ and I’m also trying to get help from the discord ￼

developer_response.body:
Hey TheprosVR,

Sorry to hear that you’re experiencing this issue. The first time the game launches, it may take a little longer to load. In some cases, the music stops during the loading process, which can make it seem like the game is stuck. Please give it up to a minute to finish loading.

Our team has also reached out to you on Discord. Please check your DMs when you have a chance. 🙂

Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Amazing game but needs more weapons
reviews.review_description: I’ve played this game for 2 years now and I have been enjoying all the game modes and I like the weapons however I wish there could be more like maybe even superpowers or something

Not sure why I don't see anyone else having the same problem as me. My left hand won't stay gripped even though I'm still holding the grip button. I can't fly drop ships or drive tanks because I can't grab the handles at the same time. It'll initially grab, but then my left hand comes undone. Same thing with two handed guns. I had to fire all my guns one-handed. I thought maybe it was a hardware issue, but my grip controls worked great in other games. Tried clearing my cache then uninstalling and reinstalling making sure I had enough space. I've changed settings, I reset the quest settings to default, but I can never seem to fix this. It used to work in the past just fine. Suddenly after one of the updates, it started doing this glitch.

developer_response.body:
Hi!

Sorry you’re running into this issue, that definitely shouldn’t be happening, it's the first time we see it. 
 
To better understand what’s going on, could you please let us know which Meta Quest OS version you’re using? You can find it in your headset under Settings > General > Software Update > Current Version. We will try to reproduce it. 

Feel free to reach out to us at support@virtualage.com  or join our Discord here: https://discord.gg/byDbRMS and we’ll be happy to help 😊

Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
I got this game a couple months ago it was great. after the last big update about a month ago it became nothing but constant server drops whenever played.

 I have a super high speed internet connection my latency is always less than 15 ms, and my connection speeds are always super fast. this is the only game that i own that drops me from servers constantly.

I logged in today and there was either a new update or they screwed up something else. nearly all the skins that i had purchased throughout the game are no longer on my list as purchased. They are no longer showing as owned and it's trying to get me to rebuy all of them again.

I have even removed the game and redownloaded all the files in hopes of a fix and i'm still getting server drops constantly.

This is the only game in my entire library that has this problem. i'm goin to recommend NOT purchasing this game anymore.

It needs a great deal of work on the servers and connections. This issue is happening to many others as well. It's not isolated. It's bad enough I'm about to quit permanently.

developer_response.body:
Hi DarthMagnus01,

Thank you for taking the time to share this. We're really sorry to hear about the disconnect issues and the missing skins.

The good news is I just checked and your account progress is still on our servers, so we should be able to help restore anything that isn’t appearing correctly. Please reach out to us so we can help you restore your account.

You can contact us at support@virtualage.com or join our Discord here:  https://discord.gg/9um6jqCpeY and we’ll be happy to help you resolve this.

We’re also actively investigating reports of server disconnects and appreciate you bringing this to our attention. Looks like some players are much more affected than others so any additional information you can give us help us trouble shoot the issue.

Thanks

reviews.review_title: I can tell it has potential, but…
reviews.review_description:
Guardians has some real potential, and that much is apparent, unfortunately it’s just not executed properly.

I like the story and character design because they’re rather unique in their own ways. I also like the amount of progression there is with lots to do.

However, the mechanics are garbage. The jetpack is extremely glitchy to the point where you will get stuck on certain surfaces. The sound design isn’t very good either, with an annoying clicking sound in the menu. The units you spawn down stop working if you go a certain distance, making you lose points under your control, and there is a lot more.

But the map editor is a whole other level of garbage. There is no grid snap which is basically an essential for all map builders and the controls are so clunky. On top of that, the menu is confusing and just looks horrendous.

All that being said though, I can tell guardians will be for some, unfortunately, I am not one of them. But I still hold out hope for planetfall being a better game than frontlines.

I purchased this game and it’s not opening up and allowing me to play it! I have tried the steps you informed me to complete those thing did not work at all I also paid for a Meta Horizon+ subscription and it still keeps telling me I don’t have the subscription

developer_response.body:
Hi!

Sorry to hear you’re stuck on the loading screen, this can happen when the game for some reason is not installing correctly in the headset.

Please try clearing the app data and reinstalling the game. You can clear the app data directly from your headset by going to Settings > General > Storage, selecting the game, and choosing Clear App Data.
After that, reinstall the game and fully restart your headset before launching it again.

If the issue persists, please reach out to us at support@virtualage.com
 or join our Discord here: https://discord.gg/byDbRMS
 and we’ll be happy to help you further 🙂

Thanks for your patience

reviews.review_description: After update, the game didn't work. Just only black screen or freezing. I complained this on review and dev team replied so quickly. But unfortunately, their guidance didn't work. So I wrote email again. Dev team also replied quickly. Their quick response made me sure that any problem in this game could be solved eventually. Thank you, Dev. team!!

developer_response.body:
Hi adimasana6327! 

Thank you for reaching out, the black screen usually appears due a faulty installation. 

Please make sure that you have enough space in the headset (4.2GB), then uninstall and reinstall the game again. 

If that still doesn't work, please feel free to send us an email at support@virtualage.com or join our discord server here: https://discord.gg/GSyTPS9wZ2 and we will be happy to help you. 

Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I bought this to play with my husband and I was able to load it on Quest 3 but it will not get past the loading window on Quest 2. It's a shame because it's a really cool game but we cannot play together with Quest 2 and we're not going to go out and buy a second Quest 3 headset at this point it's just a shame

developer_response.body:
Hey Janetlee1043, 

I'm sorry that you are experiencing this issue, but the game is fully compatible with Quest2. 

The first time it can take a while for the game to load, sometimes the music stops giving the impression the game is stuck, but please wait it can take up to a minute to load in some cases. 

If that still doesn't work, would you mind to send us an email at support@virtualage.com or join our discord server here please? https://discord.gg/byDbRMS

Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
5* and here's why. "Think of the movie Starship troopers" The game alone is great! It runs extremely good on Quest 3 "no motion sickness" its a fun campaign that will suck you in again and again full of a ton of different alien enemies...although it's short it's totally re-playable. There's so many weapons and upgrades you can unlock including mechs, cannons & drones. Then we have multi-player and thats where this game gets really intense and the community of players and maps are very cool & abundant. If you are looking for a good VR shooter thats a mix of Halo and Starship-troopers you found it! 5*
Hopefully the devs keep up the great work 👍 

May I suggest the following? 
New weapons "maybe a workshop" to build onto the basic weapons you get would be cool... like change plasma colors, or gold plated guns or even a custom paint the weapon option would be really cool.
A custom avatar maker "or more avatar heads" personal request "Grey alien 👽" 
Last request would be a co-op map called moon base and make earth in the heavens showing a mass alien invasion happening and make the mission conquer the alien armada and destroy their warp gate "shoot down a highly guarded tower/towers surrounded by the aliens" 🤪 would be rad!!! You guys rock!

This game is terrible. There movement is terrible. You can't step off of a ledge more than 6 inches. You have a jetpack that only works sometimes. Reloading is awful. Not only do they make you manipulate the mag and slide with the TOP trigger (instead of the bottom) but hald the time I go to grab a mag and I grab my left weapon. Please fix your garbage game.

The game is semi fun but some weapons are just unbalanced, I can kill boses in 10 shots with a shotgun that has infinite ammo. The gunplay sucks and the world builder is unituative. Would be a great game but little things make it boring, like the AI voiceover that plays in thine ear 24/7 and some missions aren’t physically possible on the harder difficulty’s. The game forces you to use the stupid teleporting mechanics to jump across the base or you will fail the missions. It’s not very fun and feels half baked.
Devs are not really fixing problems anymore. The game is not playable anymore. Don`t buy!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi FaBLN73,

We’re actively investigating reports of server disconnects and appreciate you bringing this to our attention. Looks like some players are much more affected than others so any additional information you can give us help us trouble shoot the issue.

Do the disconnects happen in all maps? During a particular time of day? Any information you can gives helps :) You can contact us at support@virtualage.com or join our Discord here:  https://discord.gg/9um6jqCpeY 

Thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE 11/27/2025
It's embarrassing.  
So it's come down to this...since we started playing this game; we haven't played any of the dozens and dozens and dozens of other VR games, or any other platform games such as Switch, Xbox, computer,  etc.
That's just embarrassing right? This game is quite literally that much fun. We could have saved a lot of money if we had found this game first. 😄😄 

Other insights: 
The community is awesome.  
The maps keep expanding in range and difficulty.
There's new challenges being coded by the devs every few months.  
The map makers are very responsive. 
The devs are very responsive. 
The game is massive.  
Although you'll win some conquests, you will never reach the end. 

UPDATE 9/7/2024 Since purchase, we've each logged around 250 hours of playtime on this game. It's the only game we play now. It's worth every penny! The player-contributed maps are phenomenal and add a whole new dimension to the game--making it a positively massive game that is constantly evolving.  

You will not be mad that you bought this game. It's amazing. 

Appreciate using teleport in a tactical shooter. Husband and I've logged too many hours in the first week. The graphics are rather good. You can progressively set the levels you want to attack in each chapter. You can level up weapons, outfits, rank, etc. 

With the player maps, this game lasts forever! 


Update 8/1/24
Y'all. Just get the game. Be prepared for an intervention. It's addictive AF!
They had my account deleted and now it’s back thanks to the people here it was a great game can’t wait for guardians planetfall

developer_response.body:
Hi PepsiCheif32,

Sorry to hear you're experiencing this issue. I just checked your user profile on our servers and your progress is still there, so we should be able to help you recover it.

Please reach out to us at support@virtualage.com
 or join our Discord here: https://discord.gg/byDbRMS
 and we’ll be happy to help restore your account. 

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I've updated the game didn't work reinstalled and it still didn't work
This is the best VR Shooter I’ve ever played! Very responsive. Guns are accurate. Fun all around! PvE PvP and a map builder!

There was another review. I read from six days ago before I posted this one, and simply they said if they would’ve gotten this game first, then that’s all they needed.  

Well, I can now see why they say that after playing this game for a couple of days!  Lots of fun and well done by the developers!

Campaign mode:
This gets your feet wet and you learn how to play the game going through those 12 missions, and if you add the Li’l training module on top of it, then 13 total.

Just started playing the multiplayer missions where you’re fighting side-by-side with comrades , and I must say that is also a lot of fun.

￼ Game runs pretty smooth, and I haven’t had any crashes or concerns with bugs (pun intended) so far .

If you’re reading this, all I can say is get this game .

UPDATE - 12/22/2025:

Still playing this awesome game!  There have been a couple disconnects and a couple crashes, and the game can get laggy every once in a while, but 95% of the time it’s just gone right awesome!￼

I completed my first Galactic conquest and got my first skin from that campaign.  The community overall is pretty solid, but there are some exceptions of bad people. That being said, you can make it private or closed with a bunch of friends you like hanging with while trying a challenging mission!

PVP is an option if you like that as well, but that’s not my cup of tea, but I have dabbled a little bit.

The game still remains pretty solid in my opinion.  If you like Hell Divers for PC then you will love this game!








￼

There was a problem with the game not loading, but the developers helped me through it. I highly recommend not only because of the fantastic game play, but because of the support from the developers.

Update 10-21-23
Could you make it possible to filter out multi-player games that are locked?

Why is it that even though I destroy the most bugs/nests during a match, I get fewer points than my teammates?

I’ve been playing for several months and love the game, but my friends and I are frequently getting booted off the server mid game.
The latest test update has left me unable to join a game for more than 30 seconds. Fix it!
I am very happy with the game but it always asks me to reconnect, please can you fix this as soon as possible. Thank you and have a nice day

reviews.review_title: Fun RTS/FPS with good community support
reviews.review_description: The RTS layer is stronger than the FPS layer, but the combination has been fun enough and felt VR native enough for me to go buy this on Steam now that it's leaving Quest+.

Amazing game! I had vr (with all of the top selling games) for a couple of years. I barely played--mostly just used the virtual movie theater occasionally. But after finding this game (and Arizona sunshine remake) I play daily...I also don't like multiplayer games, but sometimes seeing people join your game just when you need help is great... And the endless maps make this game continually worth it. Highly recommended.

reviews.review_title: Fun but the ai voice lines kill me.
reviews.review_description: The game is very fun but please PLEASE hire someone to do some voicelines or one of the devs can do it but the ai voice that says everything KILLS the immersion heavy,

This game is just some Wannabe shooter with Nice graphics 
Boring insect enemys 
No story at all 
I would bever buy this again , that's for sure
I love that it doesn't get boring. There are so many creative worlds. So much fun!
Just like the movie 👿. Had alot of fun shooting alien insect butt 😆
Cant even start the game it freezes ar loading screen no matter how many times I try to run it

developer_response.body:
Hi!

Sorry to hear you’re stuck on the loading screen, this can happen when the game for some reason is not installing correctly in the headset.

Please try clearing the app data and reinstalling the game. You can clear the app data directly from your headset by going to Settings > General > Storage, selecting the game, and choosing Clear App Data.
After that, reinstall the game and fully restart your headset before launching it again.

If the issue persists, please reach out to us at support@virtualage.com
 or join our Discord here: https://discord.gg/byDbRMS
 and we’ll be happy to help you further 🙂

Thanks for your patience, and we hope to get you back in the game soon!

reviews.review_description:
Update..been playing this for over 1 year now and its the only game I still play after 5 years of using VR!. Play every day if i can.
There are many new maps every day and the people are amazing and majority are adults.  best game i have ever played and I am 63yo F.  Go through the training first which is a bit dull..but once you start playing properly it is fantastic.
*****
I've been playing this for approx 6 months and play every day.    The playability is so good with over 3k of maps and many brilliant map makers. The scenery is stunning and sometimes I just have to look around me. The weapons are easy to use and levelling up gives you more and more bonus items which makes learning it all much easier as you learn as you go.   I have met so many lovely friendly people too.
I am 62 and there seems to be mostly adults and very few kids. Enjoy!

It would be great if the developers made some other games similar with zombie type things in one.  Vampires/warewolves in another. etc  I cannot find any games in 4 years that are as great as this one.

reviews.review_title: Truly a hidden gem of a game
reviews.review_description: I had this game on a wishlist for months.  Busy playing other games that either weren't finished, very buggy or just really toxic PVP action.  Having enough stress in my real life, I wanted something that was actually a blast to play.  This is that game.  Absolutely gorgeous maps.  And maps?  Apparently there are countless planets and 10,000+ maps so you can never get bored.  Last night, my husband and I played with two other people and they were so nice and so helpful with tips.  They spawned in at a perfect time and a team of 4 makes a great difference.  Gameplay is smooth and intuitive.  Weapons are unique, accurate, and weapon upgrades are available after only a few successful missions.   This is a game that doesn't punish you for dying or losing.  You just laugh and try again.  It is a truly positive and exciting adventure and I can't wait to see more planets and play with good people.
If you like Helldivers in vr well this is the game
I never got in because it wouldn't load ￼

This is the only game I play on a consistent basis. Great community of players and developers. 

One thing for the owner, I purchase drone/robot/cannon skins (two colors) but neither one shows. Can you assist/help me with that?

reviews.review_title: Game doesn't run on my Quest 3
reviews.review_description: Just a blank screen with some background music. Refund please!

developer_response.body:
Hi Mooseman6600! 

Thank you for reaching out, the black screen usually appears due a faulty installation. 

Please make sure that you have enough space in the headset (4.2GB), then uninstall and reinstall the game again. 
 
If that still doesn't work, please feel free to send us an email at support@virtualage.com or join our discord server here: https://discord.gg/GSyTPS9wZ2 and we will be happy to help you. 

Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This is my favorite game right now.   Lots of fun.

The best game on VR ! 
Highly Recommend

The gane is good and fun but graphics are not really that good so it would be better to improve with better lighting too. I wish that when you fire with a rifle the bullets would look more realistic. And I also wish that there would be way more enemies and different types of monsters it would also be better if you improve the way others see people move in the game. It would also be funner if you add more game modes like a battle royale were the last one standing wins. I wish that there were planets that were super different to have more interesting experiences. If the developers did this the gane would be a 10/10 
I love the way you can be a commander and a soldier and that there are different weapons and vehicles.
This is a fun game! It takes a bit to learn about all the cool things you can do when play but you meet people as you go along and for the most part it’s beginner friendly.

The app developer writes "No internet required" in the app description.
But when you start the app, you can only stay and configure things. However, you cannot start before you have turned on Wi-Fi.
Even past missions are not available.

I am not the only one with this problem.
The support team said they would fix this issue. But they didn't!
It doesn't seem to be a bug. 
I believe that they are not making the entire app available for players to download, but that we have to re-download the missions every time we start the app!!!
Why?!?!
I will assert my right to a refund.
I don't wanna support "only online life" 🤮

Hi developers, 

Can you confirm an ETA to reinstate the bhaptics native support?

Thank you,

reviews.review_title: It's good but it has a major bug
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty good overall but entity collisions. I swear they spent 5 minutes on entity. Collisions and also properly asked AI to make it. I can do a better job with entity collisions and I haven't spent much time coding.

I have been playing this game for a while. I have learned it doesn't matter how good you are... To score and get top score, you just have to stand back and shoot monsters. The point of conquest is to kill all the bug nests in a map. Those who man up and kill bug nests get no points/very few points. While the people that stand back and let the machines do all the work get all the points.

What's with lots of people being named Nova?
It’s a good game ok graphics but all over all I’ll give it a four it’s just missing something but idk

The game is a CRAZY idea and its implemented well. BUT.

When I try to play without Internet connection, it lets me. Mostly..

 I can load the ship, but when I try to start a mission from the screen (campaign of course, I'm offline) the UI breaks and doesn't allow me to start, signifying to me that I can't play campaign without Internet. 
  However, weirdly. I can attempt to create a custom map.
  I brute forced my way past Loading screens attempting to search for made maps, and entered map creation. THIS is the only way that I have experienced your game so far other than the first mission.

  While this is okay.. it gets boring after a 30 minute building session for a map that isn't going to save. So I'll have to rebuild everything from scratch if I want to have a decent time trying to play.

  I just don't want to have to make a map from scratch and place enemy spawners and make the waves all just to play a defense game.

  PLEASE make the campaign offline accessible!

developer_response.body:
Hey SniperStrm!

Thanks for the review and feedback,  we will review this part for the next update, the campaign should be playable in offline mode. 

cheers!

reviews.review_description:
I am 50 and a gamer all my life but this is Probably the best game I've ever played. 

I play it all night like I am 19 and it's fun for months on end.. 

Thanks for developing and all the players

Never once in my wildest dreams about the future of gaming back on PS2 and PS3 I would have guessed I would one day be inside a crazy big world full of explosive shooting action while deploying my own personal army and fighting along their side and other players on maps designed by other players themselves on a mobile chip powered VR headset... crazy Tomorrowland...

this goes so well beyond in many ways what we had available back then... it's criminal it's not more well known...
Gameplay is very good.And there are many player-made maps to play in the online mode. But the game itself does not have many stage. It would be better if more stage and a storyline could be added.

Really enjoyed this game for many months. Now all that happens is I get a message during play that I have been disconnected from the server!!! Super frustrating playing on any maps as I can no longer complete any missions without a server disconnect!!! When will this issue be fixed?? Not what I was expecting. Am I alone in this?

Good game 
Really like the co op
Wish they add more maps

For whatever reason after logging back in to the game after a month, all my research and weapons were gone and I have to buy it all again.

I am level Master 11 and I'm using the starting weapons with zero upgrades. Where did all my gear go? I had it all unlocked and now it's gone. I played with other people and they said they didn't have any problems like mine, they get to keep their stuff and points. Why did mine dissappear?

developer_response.body:
Hi Darktrap,

I’m really sorry you experienced this issue. I’ve restored all your weapons and tech.

When you log back into the game, you should see a "Restore Progress" pop-up. Please click Restore and then restart the game.

If the issue persists, please reach out to us on our Discord server here: https://discord.gg/GSyTPS9wZ2 or by email at support@virtualage.com, we’ll be happy to help you.

Apologies again for the inconvenience, and thanks for your patience.

Cheers

reviews.review_title: Its look like call of duty inf wars
reviews.review_description: Still no played it yet but the trailer is VERY FIRE
Great game. Packed with action and content. Not perfectly polished, but still very enjoyable.

I drug my feet about buying this game but im glad I did in the end. It's fun. Met some cool people and if not there are tons of lobbies at anytime to choose from. Ive searched many games and this one sticks out. What makes it different is the ability to make custom maps. I think we all groan when a game is $24 and 3 hours worth of fun. This one allows players to create custom maps to keep things interesting. TONS of maps. The players are also really nice from what ive seen. They helped me get started without issue. Overall id recommended this to anyone that likes shooters and a challenge.

This is a great game. Since I came across this game, I play it almost every day. The game is very exciting, and there are really many community maps. Every time you enter a room, it is almost a different map, which makes the game almost always feel fresh.

reviews.review_title: Great game and are really helpful
reviews.review_description: I love this game it’s a mix of halo and Star Wars, supper great just kinda hard to get research points for noobs but other wise Great game. Also I bought this game again and after buy both of the supporter pack and spending same and being left with around 400k materials and I played a match it it had went down to 9k without me spending anything and they have resolved it in just 2-3 days

The gameplay is kind of like halo with a campaign multiplayer the “guardians” are like Spartans. The game is decent but the voice chat needs a little bit of work and I can barley hear anyone but overall it’s good

The game is fun.  It's easy to learn, easy to play. My next step is to check out the community for myself as I have heard various opinions.

Update. Even more fun playing conquest, all I have teamed up with have been great, just can't put the game down at present 👊🏾
Bought this when it came out and just slept on it until now. I’ve gotta say though that it is a lot of fun. Plenty of content and it runs flawlessly. Good job devs

developer_response.body:
Hello Rambrocious, 

I'm sorry you are experiencing this issue. This happens to some players, the game data is corrupted for some reason 
   
These steps usually fix the problem :

1. Put on your Quest goggles and go to:
`Settings > General > Storage > Look for the Guardians game > Click on the "Clear Data" button next to the trash bin.`

2 Open the game again. If your save game is lost, don’t worry, do the following inside the game:
`In the game, go to: Settings > Account > Restore Progress (without entering any email).` 
  
Please let us know if this works for you or if you need further assistance on our discord server here: https://discord.gg/GSyTPS9wZ2   

Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Think HALO, but in VR… this is literally what it is! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

If you have a quest 3, you can forget this. The multiplayer has too many bugs, freezes, crashes and similar, and no its not my hardware or on my side, other games dont have this at all.

The single player option , also freezes alot, but is barely playable, but overall, it feels very sloppy on the quest 3.

developer_response.body:
Hi YautjaPrime,

We’re very sorry to hear about the issues you’re experiencing. Could you please check which version of Meta OS you’re currently using? You can find it under Settings > General > Software Update.

Some players have reported significant performance and memory issues with Meta OS v77, leading to crashes and instability in multiple games. If you’re on v77, please update to the latest version (v78), which should resolve the problem.
 
If the issue persists after updating, feel free to contact us at support@virtualage.com. We’ll be happy to assist you further.

Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Can't stop playing. New maps daily.
reviews.review_description: This fun game is great in groups. Play with people you know or join any open map. You can build new maps or just enjoy killing bugs that are invading the planets! I'm addicted. I don't like PVP games, but that's available too.
and a great community 😌🖖🌳
This is my favorite game.
I just got this game and I love it
To much to write on this, terrible experiance

developer_response.body:
Hi RiotStarter28 

I’m really sorry you didn't have a good first experience. Could you elaborate on exactly is broken please? Any information helps :) 

The game is updated regularly and we would love to hear what needs to be fixed. Just next week we are releasing a new patch and we still have time to include some improvements and fixes in it.

Please reach us at support@virtualage.com or join our community at https://discord.gg/GSyTPS9wZ2 and we’ll work with you directly to fix any potential issues you are seeing. 

Cheers.

reviews.review_description: I haven't played a VR game that is quite so versatile as this one. Play it as a FPS, or a click away to play from a RTS point of view. Domination, Conquer, Defense, Escort, and even a PVP mode. A map maker included for the creative types. Online community is the best... if you need help getting through something, just play online with the option for people to join in... the multiplayer works great and the players are mature. A game in progress, of course there are bugs... but they have done many updates including the latest which was just 2 days ago, so they still put resources into this game. Most importantly is the action is genuinely a blast. Shooting bugs and jumping around with a boost assist is amazing fun. A must have in any library
MAN THIS IS LIKE HELLDIVERS VR MAN
Fixed  problem.  Developers reached out and helped.  Problem casued by slow WiFi data transfer rate resulting in  parsing issue.

developer_response.body:
Hello Crusher2828, 

I'm sorry you are experiencing this issue. Looks like either the installation is corrupted or the game data is corrupted. 

Can you try the following steps please?    

1. Delete and reinstall the game. Most cases are solved by just a simple reinstallation. If that doesn't work:

2. Put on your Quest goggles and go to:
`Settings > General > Storage > Look for the Guardians game > Click on the "Clear Data" button next to the trash bin.`

3. Open the game again. If your save game is lost, don’t worry, do the following inside the game:
`In the game, go to: Settings > Account > Restore Progress (without entering any email).` 

Please let us know if this works for you or if you need further assistance on our discord server here: https://discord.gg/GSyTPS9wZ2   

Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Buggy but fun AND I lost my Purchase
reviews.review_description:
The game is high paced action and the addition of new maps is great BUT

The game has many glitches, with walls that shove your arms out of the way, movement being choppy, frequent crashing, and now, I recently invested in the research potions and, when my game crashed and I had to reinstall it, I was put back to an early version BEFORE I had purchased those research vials.

Love the game, not very keen on the flow

Updated:  Reinstalled and it works!  Had/have plenty of drive space so no idea why a  install.  Still seems to stutter here and there but gameplay is fine Leaving original  post in case others have this issue.
    
/original post/  .Won’t even start on my Quest 3…. just get a black screen some ambient noise and some beeping 




Note to Meta:  Fix the IOS App!! You can’t hide the keyboard and it obscures the submit sutton  Took me 30 mins to write this update.

developer_response.body:
Hi AdAstra2109, 

I'm sorry you are experiencing this issue. Looks like a faulty installation, could you please check that you have at least 4.5GB of free space in your headset? If you do please uninstall the game and install it again, that solves most installation problems. 

If you still can't start the game please reach out to support@virtualage.com or join our discord server here: https://discord.gg/byDbRMS and we will be very happy to help you. 

Thanks

reviews.review_title: Can't get into the game recently
reviews.review_description: Please repair ASAP

developer_response.body:
Hi LittleFly.Vr,

Could you please elaborate on the issue? 

Is the game not starting? If so, please try clearing the game's local data and then launch it again. Go to > Settings > General > Storage > Look for the Guardians game > Click on the "Clear Data" button next to the trash bin. (Don’t worry — your progress is backed up on our cloud, so you’ll be able to recover it. ) 

If you need further assistance, feel free to reach out to us at support@virtualage.com
 or join our Discord server here: https://discord.gg/GSyTPS9wZ2 
 
Cheers!

reviews.review_title: It does what a good game should do,FUN!
reviews.review_description:
The weapons feel great, the Sound of the weapons is very good and you can really feel the "BOOOM" , even throwing grenades and using the shotgun works incredibly well, unlike other VR Shooters.... 
Reloading is also cool and simply fun, but I have trouble holstering the weapons. They usually just fall to the ground and are automatically holstered. I would like to see visible holsters here.

The graphic, especially on the Quest 3, look incredibly good for a standalone Title and when think about whats going on, on those large maps at the same time. 

I'm more of a solo player, but I've also tried out one of the countless community maps. You can also play these offline, which is really great And increases the replayability enormously. 

I can't say much about the vehicles yet, as I've only driven the Mech so far, but that's also a lot of fun if you have practice.

And then there are the strategic elements: buying units, placing them, commanding them, repairing them, etc. I'm not really a fan of that, but here it's so well integrated into the gameplay that everything just flows smoothly.

Tastes differ and everyone has their own opinion, but I simply can't understand many of the one-star ratings. 
This great VR title has been constantly improved with free updates for years, and there's so much content from the community alone, it's insane! 

I just noticed that no matter what I do, I can't change the sound settings. I can't turn off the Music, I can't turn down the weapon sounds... I don't know what I'm doing wrong here.

In my opinion, this title belongs in every VR library and I hope for more great updates in the Future!
It’s good but the campaign missions so far are all the same
